name: Mushroom, Anchovy and Rosemary Focaccia
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a medium skillet.
2. Cut the mushroom into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
3. Saute the mushroom slices in hot oil until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Place the sauteed mushrooms on the focaccia or pizza crust.
5. Arrange the anchovy strips on top of the mushrooms.
6. Sprinkle with rosemary and provolone cheese.
7. Place the dish on a baking sheet.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until the cheese melts and the bread is hot, 6 to 10 minutes.
9. Serve hot.
